text:
f the astrologer is tired, depleted or exhausted he will not be in a position to help the client
much. But it is seen that many people force the astrologers, thus ending up getting dicey
predictions.
The perfect example to make this understand is by comparing it with the game of cricket. A
good astrologer will give decent predictions, but at times will be out by doing silly
mistakes, which again depends upon astrologer’s time & the client’s time. Also not all of
them do well.
Many veteran cricketers know the rules, strokes, & can talk about cricket inside out but
when it comes to performance on the ground very few succeed, and this depends upon his
time, practise & consistency.
In any job, profession or field - performance matters, and astrologers should also be seen
from the same angle, rather than just shutting the doors to this valuable science out of total
ignorance.
People who view this articles with the right sense, and who find it logical will have their
